description: Fix agent identity resolution so multiple concurrent Claude Code instances in the same project each show their own unique agent ID on the statusline and dashboard. Adds claude_pid to session state, PPID-chain matching in statusline, short ID display in dashboard AgentCard, and updates resolve_agent_id() across all call sites.

phases.name: Session State Schema + Hook Registration
phases.description: Add claude_pid field to SessionState struct. Set it via parent_id() in register_session_agent() and try_lazy_register(). This is the foundation — all other changes depend on session files containing claude_pid.

tasks.name: Add claude_pid to SessionState struct
tasks.description: Add `claude_pid: Option<u32>` with serde default to SessionState in hook.rs. Set via std::os::unix::process::parent_id() in both register_session_agent() and try_lazy_register().

phases.name: Statusline PPID-Chain Matching
phases.description: Update hex-statusline.cjs to walk the PPID chain via ps, match session files by claude_pid, and display name:shortId format for uniqueness.

tasks.name: PPID-chain session matching in statusline
tasks.description: Replace 'newest file' strategy with PPID-chain walk. Collect ancestor PIDs via ps, match session files by claude_pid field. Fallback to newest for legacy files without claude_pid.

tasks.name: Display name:shortId format
tasks.description: Always show {name}:{8-char-uuid} on statusline for uniqueness across concurrent agents. E.g. claude-jaco2.lan:d9c3b1c0

phases.name: Dashboard Agent Identity
phases.description: Add 8-char short ID display to AgentCard component in dashboard assets for visual disambiguation.

tasks.name: Add short ID to AgentCard
tasks.description: Show 8-char agent ID prefix in monospace font next to agent name. Full UUID on hover via title attribute.

phases.name: Resolve Agent ID Unification
phases.description: Update all resolve_agent_id() call sites to use the priority order: CLAUDE_SESSION_ID → HEX_AGENT_ID → claude_pid PPID match → filtered newest. Currently duplicated across nexus_client.rs, mcp.rs, test.rs, agent.rs.

tasks.name: Add claude_pid matching to nexus_client::read_session_agent_id
tasks.description: After CLAUDE_SESSION_ID check fails, walk PPID chain and match session files by claude_pid field before falling back to newest. This is the primary resolution path used by MCP tools.

tasks.name: Unify resolve_agent_id across mcp.rs, test.rs, agent.rs
tasks.description: DRY: Replace duplicated resolve_agent_id() functions in mcp.rs, test.rs, and agent.rs with calls to the canonical implementation in nexus_client.rs. All should use the same priority chain.

phases.name: Build + Validate
phases.description: Rebuild hex-cli and hex-nexus binaries. Verify the session file contains claude_pid after restart. Verify statusline shows correct unique identity per instance.

tasks.name: Rebuild binaries and restart nexus
tasks.description: cargo build --release for hex-cli and hex-nexus. Restart nexus daemon. Verify session file contains claude_pid after new session-start hook fires.

tasks.name: Multi-instance validation
tasks.description: Open two Claude Code instances in hex-intf. Verify each shows a different shortId on its statusline. Verify dashboard AgentFleet shows both with distinct short IDs.
